name: formbro-cli
description: Canadian immigration form automation: read/write applications, persons, employers; fill IRCC IMM PDFs (agent surface: `formbro fill`, auto TR/PR detect); drive local webform fills.

interface.shortDescription: Canadian immigration form automation via the FormBro CLI.
interface.longDescription: Read and write FormBro applicants, applications, employers, and programs; run AI-assisted document extraction; drive local Playwright/Chromium IRCC portal fills (the agent prepares; the user submits). The plugin bundles the FormBro Rust CLI for macOS Apple Silicon, macOS Intel, and Windows x64. The only thing the user ever inputs is their FormBro API token (fb_…), captured once by the connect-formbro skill.
defaultPrompt: Use FormBro to find application status for <client name>.
Use FormBro to start a new TR application for <client>.
Use FormBro to fill the IMM5257 + IMM5645 PDF for application <id>.
Use FormBro to fill the IRCC portal for application <id>.
